raw_consumer_statement:
This is my XXXX complaint, and it remains unresolved. You are requested to stop closing my complaints without resolution. As referenced in the attached company letter dated XX/XX/XXXX, which I have not yet received, the company has failed to acknowledge the {$400.00} paid for the XXXX statement. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, I called your customer service team regarding a payment I thought had been applied to my Macy 's account. I informed the representative that I would check with my bank, as the payment was made through online bill pay. I called back the next day and confirmed that the payment had been misdirected to another payee and that I would go to a Macy 's store to make the payment myself. I also requested that any late charges be waived, which the representative agreed to. However, without my request or authorization, the initial representative created a dispute on my account, which led to significant confusion and complications. XXXX months later, I was informed by a family member that her Macy 's payment was reversed and her account debited, with the explanation that her payment had been applied to my account-which is entirely false. To make matters worse, your representative allegedly asked my family member to verify my personal information-while I was not on the call, and without my knowledge or permission. This is a serious violation of my privacy rights. Since then, my account has been wrongfully debited, and I have been attempting to resolve this situation for XXXX year without resolution.
